# Indoor Positioning Research, Engineering, and Deployment Hub

Ahmed Mansour research hub for indoor positioning, Wi-Fi fingerprinting, crowdsensing, autonomous radio mapping, PDR, indoor-outdoor detection, RTLS, GNSS/PDR integration, and spatial intelligence.

## Core pages
- Home: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/
- Publications: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications.html
- Research Themes: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/research-themes.html
- Citation Resources: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/citation-resources.html
- Metadata JSON: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/data/publications.json

## Publication pages
- AC-HMM: azimuth-constrained hidden Markov model-based map matching for robust pedestrian positioning in urban canyons (2026): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/ac-hmm-azimuth-constrained-map-matching-urban-canyons.html
- Drift-Resistant Heading Estimation for Smartphone-Based Indoor Positioning via Adaptive Calibration Using Wi-Fi Fingerprinting and Magnetic Stability (2026): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/drift-resistant-heading-estimation-wifi-magnetic-stability.html
- GNSS Positioning Aided with Pedestrian Dead Reckoning (PDR) in Urban Areas (2026): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/gnss-positioning-aided-with-pdr-in-urban-areas.html
- Hybrid Neural Network-Based PDR with Multi-Layer Heading Correction Across Smartphone Carrying Modes (2026): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/hybrid-neural-network-pdr-multi-layer-heading-correction.html
- Reliability-governed scaling of mobile crowdsensing-based 3D radio mapping for ubiquitous indoor positioning: An uncertainty-aware lifecycle review and deployment-oriented pipeline (2026): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/reliability-governed-3d-radio-mapping-lifecycle-review.html
- Towards scalable indoor positioning systems (IPS): User-centric challenges, methods, and recommendations for user-friendly crowd-powered framework (2026): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/towards-scalable-ips-user-centric-crowd-powered-framework.html
- Uncertainty-aware risk mapping with passive WiFi and modified Zonal Safety Analysis (mZSA) in BIM for construction (2026): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/uncertainty-aware-risk-mapping-passive-wifi-bim-construction.html
- A Modular Prompting Framework for AI-Guided Unobtrusive User Engagement in Crowd-Powered Indoor Positioning with Semantic Knowledge Graphs and GPT-4-Based LLMs (2025): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/modular-prompting-ai-guided-user-engagement-crowd-powered-ips.html
- Enhancing real-time heading estimation for pedestrian navigation via deep learning and smartphone embedded sensors (2025): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/enhancing-real-time-heading-estimation-deep-learning-smartphone-sensors.html
- Tightly Coupled Bluetooth Enhanced GNSS/PDR System for Pedestrian Navigation in Dense Urban Environments (2024): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/tightly-coupled-bluetooth-enhanced-gnss-pdr-urban.html
- Towards Ubiquitous IPS: Leveraging Crowdsourced Data Accumulation Over Time to Alleviate Reliance on External Sources in Initial Fingerprinting Map Generation (2024): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/towards-ubiquitous-ips-crowdsourced-data-accumulation.html
- Everywhere: A Framework for Ubiquitous Indoor Localization (2023): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/everywhere-framework-ubiquitous-indoor-localization.html
- Indoor Localization Based on Multi-Sensor Fusion, Crowdsourcing, and Multi-User Collaboration (2023): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/phd-thesis-indoor-localization-multi-sensor-crowdsourcing-collaboration.html
- Leveraging human mobility and pervasive smartphone measurements-based crowdsourcing for developing self-deployable and ubiquitous indoor positioning systems (2023): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/leveraging-human-mobility-pervasive-smartphone-crowdsourcing.html
- The Power of Many: Multi-User Collaborative Indoor Localization for Boosting Standalone User-Based Systems in Different Scenarios (2023): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/power-of-many-multi-user-collaborative-indoor-localization.html
- SUNS: A User-Friendly Scheme for Seamless and Ubiquitous Navigation Based on an Enhanced Indoor-Outdoor Environmental Awareness Approach (2022): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/suns-seamless-ubiquitous-navigation-indoor-outdoor-awareness.html
- Drift Control of Pedestrian Dead Reckoning (PDR) for Long Period Navigation under Different Smartphone Poses (2021): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/drift-control-pdr-long-period-navigation-smartphone-poses.html
